fields.name: fileName
fields.description: Name of the file, including path and extension

fields.name: sentDate
fields.description: Timestamp when the file was sent

fields.name: fromDepartment
fields.description: The department that originated the data

fields.name: toDepartment
fields.description: The department that received the data

fields.name: overdraftLimit
fields.description: The maximum amount of overdraft allowed for the account

fields.name: overdraftUsed
fields.description: The actual amount of overdraft used by the account

fields.name: usagePercent
fields.description: Percentage of the overdraft limit actually used

fields.name: notes
fields.description: Additional comments or notes about the account's overdraft usage
